results.title: The View’s Unchecked, Unlawful Bias: David Bozell on Upcoming FCC Ruling
results.description: The View’s Unchecked, Unlawful Bias: David Bozell on Upcoming FCC Ruling Media Research Center President David Bozell joined the Daily Wire’s Morning Wire podcast Wednesday morning to address the FCC’s incoming ruling on ABC’s The View and its severe bias. The FCC will determine whether The View is upholding its legal duty to “act in the public interest,” while the MRC argues that it is not doing so. Bozell explained that the MRC submitted over 2,000 pieces of evidence to the FCC proving The View ’s political imbalance. He noted that while The View was quick to host President Biden, “ The View 's executive producer said they would not invite the President of the United States,” Donald J. Trump. But the obvious imbalance reaches beyond this single instance and spans across the entire show: "When you have 130 liberal guests to so-called conservative guests, the disparity is right there for everyone to see." @DavidBozell calls out The View for blatant bias against conservatives on @MorningWire . pic.twitter.com/rJsjiA1QvW — Media Research Center (@theMRC) July 22, 2026 Bozell argued that The View fails to meet the legal public interest standard required of broadcast television, making its unchecked leftist bias unlawful: ABC is required to air programs that "act in the public interest." It doesn't benefit the public when The View is saying that ICE are murdering people in the street and it terrifies them to see American flags. @DavidBozell @MorningWire pic.twitter.com/2hgSJYDmdq — Media Research Center (@theMRC) July 22, 2026 The View is taking its taxpayer-provided access to the public airwaves for granted, as Bozell made clear. Instead of serving the public as a whole—both the Right and the Left— The View is pushing its one-sided political agenda. If they're going to be designated as a bona fide news program, I'm going to enjoy watching the small army of lawyers stand behind these ladies and have to issue retraction after retraction ... If they're not listed as a bona fide news program by the FCC, there's a strong possibility that ABC probably has to kick The View to a streaming platform. Either way, The View and its leftist ladies are in hot water. Bozell pointed to the show’s hypocrisy and lack of logic, adding, “I call it The Cackle , not The View .” Watch the entire segment here: Lauren Walsh Wed, 07/22/2026 - 12:13 Marketing Timing Regular Search Engine Title The View’s Unchecked, Unlawful Bias: David Bozell on Upcoming FCC Ruling CNS Commentary Off Media Images Image MRC Graphic

results.title: Nolan Wells Autopsy: Family Demands Answers as Investigation Continues
results.description: An independent autopsy has failed to establish a clear cause of death for 18-year-old Nolan Wells, whose family attorney says the findings remain inconclusive as an official state autopsy is still pending. Wells' mother and NAACP leaders are pressing local authorities for a more thorough investigation into his death.

results.title: Philipsen sprints to victory in Tour de France stage 17, Pogacar retains overall lead
results.description: VOIRON, France, July 22 - Belgian Jasper Philipsen prevailed in a crowded rush to the finish line to win stage 17 of the Tour de France on Wednesday, moving within seven points of green jersey holder Mads Pedersen, while Tadej Pogacar retained his overall lead.
